sentences.text_original: 你每天花多少时间看短视频？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ měitiān huā duōshao shíjiān kàn duǎn shìpín?
sentences.text_translation: Har kuni qisqa videolar ko'rishga qancha vaqt sarflaysan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько времени в день ты тратишь на короткие видео?
sentences.text_translation_en: How much time do you spend watching short videos every day?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 差不多一两个小时吧，吃饭的时候、睡觉前都会看。
sentences.pinyin: Chàbuduō yì liǎng ge xiǎoshí ba, chīfàn de shíhou, shuìjiào qián dōu huì kàn.
sentences.text_translation: Taxminan bir-ikki soat, ovqatlanayotganda ham, uxlashdan oldin ham ko'raman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Примерно час-два, смотрю и во время еды, и перед сном.
sentences.text_translation_en: About one or two hours — I watch them while eating and before bed.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kàn shénme lèixíng de nèiróng?
sentences.text_translation_en: What kind of content do you watch?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我喜欢看搞笑的、美食的和教做菜的。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān kàn gǎoxiào de, měishí de hé jiāo zuò cài de.
sentences.text_translation: Kulgili, taom haqidagi va ovqat tayyorlashni o'rgatadigan videolarni yoqtiraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Люблю смешное, про еду и про то, как готовить.
sentences.text_translation_en: I like funny ones, food ones, and ones that teach cooking.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你也看那些教你学英语的吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yě kàn nàxiē jiāo nǐ xué Yīngyǔ de ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты смотришь и те, что учат английскому?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you also watch the ones that teach you English?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 偶尔看。但是学东西我还是更喜欢看书或者上课。
sentences.pinyin: Ǒu'ěr kàn. Dànshì xué dōngxi wǒ háishì gèng xǐhuān kàn shū huòzhě shàngkè.
sentences.text_translation: Ba'zan ko'raman. Lekin biror narsa o'rganishda men baribir kitob o'qish yoki darsga borishni afzal ko'raman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Иногда смотрю. Но учиться я всё же больше люблю по книгам или на занятиях.
sentences.text_translation_en: Occasionally. But for learning, I still prefer reading books or attending classes.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你觉得看短视频能学到东西吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ juéde kàn duǎn shìpín néng xué dào dōngxi ma?
sentences.text_translation: Seningcha qisqa videolardan biror narsa o'rgansa bo'ladimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как ты думаешь, по коротким видео можно чему-то научиться?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you think you can learn anything from short videos?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 能学到一些，比如生活小技巧。但是大部分时间就是娱乐。
sentences.pinyin: Néng xué dào yì xiē, bǐrú shēnghuó xiǎo jìqiǎo. Dànshì dà bùfen shíjiān jiù shì yúlè.
sentences.text_translation: Bir nimalarni o'rgansa bo'ladi, masalan turmush uchun kichik hiyla-usullar. Lekin ko'p vaqt shunchaki ko'ngilochar.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Кое-чему можно, например бытовым лайфхакам. Но большую часть времени это просто развлечение.
sentences.text_translation_en: You can learn a few things, like little life hacks. But most of the time it's just entertainment.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你有没有觉得浪费时间？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ yǒu méiyǒu juéde làngfèi shíjiān?
sentences.text_translation: Unda vaqtni behuda sarflayapman deb o'ylamaysanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А ты не чувствуешь, что тратишь время впустую?
sentences.text_translation_en: So do you ever feel like it's a waste of time?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 有时候会。刷着刷着一个小时就过去了。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu shíhou huì. Shuā zhe shuā zhe yí ge xiǎoshí jiù guòqù le.
sentences.text_translation: Ba'zan shunday bo'ladi. Ko'rib-ko'rib o'tirsam, bir soat o'tib ketadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Иногда да. Листаешь-листаешь — и час уже прошёл.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sometimes. You keep scrolling and an hour just goes by.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我也是！本来只想看十分钟，结果停不下来。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě shì! Běnlái zhǐ xiǎng kàn shí fēnzhōng, jiéguǒ tíng bù xiàlái.
sentences.text_translation: Men ham! Aslida atigi o'n daqiqa ko'rmoqchi bo'laman, oqibatda to'xtatib bo'lmaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: У меня так же! Сначала хочешь посмотреть всего десять минут, а в итоге не можешь остановиться.
sentences.text_translation_en: Me too! I only mean to watch for ten minutes, but then I can't stop.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 所以我现在会给自己定一个时间，到了就关掉。
sentences.pinyin: Suǒyǐ wǒ xiànzài huì gěi zìjǐ dìng yí ge shíjiān, dào le jiù guāndiào.
sentences.text_translation: Shuning uchun hozir o'zimga vaqt belgilab qo'yaman, vaqti kelganda o'chiraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Поэтому теперь я ставлю себе время и, как оно наступает, выключаю.
sentences.text_translation_en: So now I set a time limit for myself, and when it's up, I turn it off.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 这个办法好。不然晚上看到很晚，影响睡觉。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè ge bànfǎ hǎo. Bùrán wǎnshang kàn dào hěn wǎn, yǐngxiǎng shuìjiào.
sentences.text_translation: Bu usul yaxshi. Aks holda kechasi juda kechgacha ko'rib, uyquga ta'sir qiladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хороший способ. Иначе будешь смотреть до поздней ночи и это повлияет на сон.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's a good method. Otherwise you watch until late at night and it affects your sleep.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对。我现在晚上十一点以后就不看了。
sentences.pinyin: Duì. Wǒ xiànzài wǎnshang shíyī diǎn yǐhòu jiù bú kàn le.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri. Men hozir kechqurun o'n birdan keyin ko'rmayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. Теперь я после одиннадцати вечера их не смотрю.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right. Now I don't watch them after eleven at night.
sentences.speaker: B
